title: Aurora, 31713, Mini Flopsies Lily The Grey Tabby, 8In, Soft Toy
features: • This cool cat boasts a cute button nose and gorgeous feline features!
• Aurora's Mini Flopsies collection - a family of fun, soft and floppy animals!
• Made from the highest quality and child friendly plush materials
description: From the manufacturer Aurora World Aurora Mini Flopsies,Lily Tabby Soft Toy, 31713 Lily the tabby cat is part of our Mini Flopsies collection. Lily is perfect for cuddles as she has a super-soft body. Lily is adored by everyone she meets because of her cute button nose, expressive eyes and gorgeous feline features. Perfect gift for cat lovers and children of all ages. Especially popular with cat lovers, our Lily Cat lays on her tummy and measures 8" in length. Molly has soft grey fur with white highlights, yellow button eyes and a pink nose. Suitable from birth About us Established in 1981, Aurora World offers an extensive range of branded products for children and adults. The company sells its product lines via a wide variety of retailers including major zoos, department stores, high-end toy stores and top gift chains, as well as hospital gift shops, fine florists, candy stores and gift/stationary stores worldwide. Aurora is known in the industry for its incredibly high quality products, range of diverse offerings.
